data.title: About VIEWCO
data.content:
### About VIEWCO

### Over 40 Years of Engineering Excellence

### About Us

### VIEWCO Engineering Co., Ltd.

### Four Decades of Engineering Excellence

Since its founding in April 1984, VIEWCO has become a leader in Hong Kong's construction industry, growing from a small company into a leading E&M engineering firm specializing in air-conditioning and ventilation systems.

### Our History

### The Early Years

### Four Decades of Engineering Excellence

VIEWCO's story began in 1984 during Hong Kong's rapid economic growth. The founder established a company dedicated to high-quality building services, quickly building a strong reputation through technical expertise and dedication.

### Our Growth

### Expansion & Specialization

### Four Decades of Engineering Excellence

VIEWCO introduced advanced technologies, focusing on air-conditioning and ventilation. The company emphasizes long-term maintenance and improvement, ensuring reliable performance for commercial buildings, offices, schools and restaurants.
